# Copper Studio

Welcome to the Copper Studio website. We are a creative agency specializing in Brand Identity, Custom Website Design & Development, and Custom Client Portals.

## Navigation & Links
- [Home](https://www.thecopperstudio.com/) - Main landing page showcasing our latest work.
- [Studio](https://www.thecopperstudio.com/studio) - Learn more about our agency and our story.
- [Services](https://www.thecopperstudio.com/services) - Detailed view of the design and development services we offer.
- [Projects](https://www.thecopperstudio.com/projects) - Our portfolio of past successful client work across various industries.
- [Contact](https://www.thecopperstudio.com/contact) - Get in touch with us to start a new project.

## Contact Information
- Email Support: [support@thecopperstudio.com](mailto:support@thecopperstudio.com)
